# SafeClaw Service Registry

Route all API calls through the SafeClaw proxy. Do NOT call upstream APIs directly.
SafeClaw auto-injects credentials (API key / OAuth2 token) before forwarding — do NOT add Authorization headers.

## Proxy Base URL

```
{{PROXY_BASE}}
```

## Your Services

{{SERVICE_TABLE}}

## Agent Configuration

Configure your AI framework to route through the proxy with a dummy key:

```yaml
# Example: OpenClaw config
providers:
  openai:
    baseUrl: {{PROXY_BASE}}/openai/v1
    apiKey: sk-dummy   # SafeClaw injects the real key — do NOT replace this
```

The `sk-dummy` placeholder is intentional. SafeClaw intercepts the request and swaps in the real API key from your encrypted vault. Never replace it with a real key.

## Custom Services

Any service registered in the SafeClaw console is accessible at:
```
{{PROXY_BASE}}/{service-name}/...
```

where `{service-name}` matches the name shown in the table above.

## Common Service Routing

For reference, common upstream services map to these proxy paths:

| Service | Proxy Path | Upstream |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| Anthropic | `{{PROXY_BASE}}/anthropic/v1` | `https://api.anthropic.com/v1` |
| OpenAI | `{{PROXY_BASE}}/openai/v1` | `https://api.openai.com/v1` |
| Google AI | `{{PROXY_BASE}}/google/v1beta` | `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta` |
| DeepSeek | `{{PROXY_BASE}}/deepseek/v1` | `https://api.deepseek.com/v1` |

(Only services registered in your vault are actually available. See "Your Services" above.)
